title: Pricing model draft — enterprise tiers
content:
Draft structure:
- Starter: $99/mo, 5 seats
- Growth: $299/mo, 25 seats
- Enterprise: custom, SLA + dedicated support

Open question: annual discount %? Competitor analysis suggests 15–20%.

title: Deploy strategy — open question
content: Need to decide: blue-green vs canary for v2.3. Ops prefers blue-green for simplicity. Eng wants canary for gradual rollout. Decision needed by EOD Friday.

title: Personal — dentist appointment
content: Book dentist for March. Last checkup was Oct 2025.

title: Research: agent memory architectures
content:
Comparing approaches:
- Episodic vs semantic memory
- LangGraph checkpointing
- Vector store for embeddings

Key finding: hybrid approach works best for multi-turn conversations.

title: Meeting notes — Acme Corp call
content: Sarah from Acme: interested in Q1 integration. Timeline: they need API access by March 15. Follow-up: send pricing doc and schedule technical deep-dive.
